org.arakhne.neteditor.android.activity

Class AbstractEditorActivity<G extends Graph<?,?,?,?>>

  • java.lang.Object
    • android.content.Context
      • android.content.ContextWrapper
        • android.view.ContextThemeWrapper
          • android.app.Activity
            • org.arakhne.neteditor.android.activity.AbstractEditorActivity<G>
  • Type Parameters:
    G - is the type of the graph supported by this editor.
    All Implemented Interfaces:
    android.content.ComponentCallbacks, android.content.ComponentCallbacks2, android.view.KeyEvent.Callback, android.view.LayoutInflater.Factory, android.view.LayoutInflater.Factory2, android.view.View.OnCreateContextMenuListener, android.view.Window.Callback
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    FSMEditorActivity

    public abstract class AbstractEditorActivity<G extends Graph<?,?,?,?>>
extends android.app.Activity
    This abstract activity permits to edit an document with the NetEditor API.
    Version:
    NetEditor Android Panel $Revision$ 2013-10-23 21:03:10
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND
    Maven Group Id:
    org.arakhne.neteditor
    Maven Artifact Id:
    neteditor-androidpanel

      • decode

        protected static NetEditorContentType decode(File file)

        Returns:
        the type of the given file or null if it is a NGR file.

      • setFileSelectionCallback

        void setFileSelectionCallback(ActionModeOwner.Callback callback)
        Set the callback that may be invoked by the mode's file selector.
        Parameters:
        callback -

      • runDifferedActionAfterSaving

        protected void runDifferedActionAfterSaving(AbstractEditorActivity.DifferedActionType action)
        Ask the user if he wants to save its document and run the specified action if a positive answer if given.

        The user may answer in following ways:

        • POSITIVE; the user clicks on the "Yes" button; then the document is saved and the action is run.
        • NEGATIVE; the user clicks on the "No" button; then the document is not saved and the action is run.
        • CANCEL; the user clicks outside the dialog box or on the back button; then the document is not saved and the action is not run.
        Parameters:
        action - is the action to run.

      • onRegisterPropertyEditors

        protected void onRegisterPropertyEditors()
        Invoked to register the property editors that are known by the activity.

        Replies if the current document has been changed since its last loading.

      • onDestroy

      • onActionPerformed

        protected void onActionPerformed(boolean isEditionEnabled,
                     Point2D hitPoint,
                     Figure... figures)
        Invoked when the user want to perform the standard action on the given figures.

        By default this function does nothing.

        Parameters:
        isEditionEnabled - indicates if the figures can be edited.
        hitPoint - is the point where the action is performed. It may be null if the position is unknown.
        figures - are the figures on which the action must be performed

      • onSecondaryActionPerformed

        protected void onSecondaryActionPerformed(boolean isEditionEnabled,
                              Figure... figures)
        Invoked when the user want to perform the standard secondary action on the given figures.

        By default this function open the property editor for the figures.

        Parameters:
        isEditionEnabled - indicates if the figures can be edited.
        figures -

        public boolean isSelectionMode()
        Replies if the activity is in selection mode.
        Returns:
        true if in selection mode.
